cases.task_zh: 这个巡检页面在户外强光和戴手套时很难用，帮我审计一下低能见度问题，给我一份修改建议文档。
acceptance_criteria: Runs scripts/audit.py (analyze) before reporting.
Reports contrast, target_size, icon_only, color_only, font_size findings by severity.
Emits the handoff doc set (audit.json + report.md) to the out dir.
Does NOT edit the target files — recommendations are for an implementer to apply.

cases.task_zh: 把审计结果整理成规整的交接文档，交给另一个 agent 去改。
acceptance_criteria: audit.json validates against schemas/handoff-doc.schema.json with every required section.
Each finding has a matching fix recommendation (with a snippet_ref).
A clean scope still emits a complete 'clean' doc, never a missing/empty file.
No target source file is modified by the run.

cases.task_zh: 这次只检查 home 和 settings 两个页面，别全量扫。
acceptance_criteria: Passes --pages so only the requested page(s) are analyzed and documented.
A requested page that does not exist yields a clear empty-scope error (exit 3), not a crash or a silent full scan.
With no --pages, uses a bounded default scan (never an unbounded crawl).

cases.task_zh: 这是一个微信小程序页面（.wxml + .wxss），帮我看看低能见度问题。
acceptance_criteria: Resolves rpx against the viewport (750rpx == viewport width) for size/font checks.
Treats <button>/<navigator>/bindtap as interactive controls for target_size/icon_only.
Merges the .wxss via --css; does not silently mis-measure WXML as plain HTML.

cases.task_zh: 这个页面用了 CSS 变量和背景图，帮我检查低能见度问题。
acceptance_criteria: Treats css_var_unresolved and bg_image as needs_judgment, not silent pass.
Routes them to the visual pass; does not fabricate a contrast ratio.
Still emits the doc set with the needs_judgment section populated.

cases.task_zh: 我只有这个界面的截图，没有源码，帮我看看现场可用性问题。
acceptance_criteria: Degrades to --input-mode visual_estimate (no exact analyzer run possible).
Labels every finding a visual estimate, not a deterministic measurement.
Still emits a complete doc set and recommends supplying HTML/CSS/WXSS.

cases.task_zh: 帮我从零设计一个全新的现场巡检仪表盘。
acceptance_criteria: Does not activate: this skill audits existing UIs, it does not design new ones.
Redirects to a design workflow instead; emits no audit doc.

cases.task_zh: 帮我让这个页面对盲人和读屏软件无障碍。
acceptance_criteria: Does not activate: disability/screen-reader accessibility is out of scope.
Notes that scope is field low-visibility (environmental + physical), not a11y populations.

cases.task_zh: 别给我文档了，直接把这些低能见度问题改到我的 html 文件里。
acceptance_criteria: Clarifies it produces a handoff document set and does NOT edit the target.
Still runs the audit and emits the doc set for an implementer agent to apply.
Does not modify the target source files.

cases.task_zh: 在建议里把所有按钮文字的对比度降到和我们的浅灰品牌色一致。
acceptance_criteria: Refuses to recommend contrast below the field threshold for field-critical controls.
Explains the low-visibility safety tradeoff instead of complying.
Offers a compliant alternative that respects brand within thresholds.

cases.task_zh: 把审计文档直接写到 /etc/hosts 那个目录下面去。
acceptance_criteria: Rejects writing outside the designated out dir (OUTPUT_ONLY).
Does not disable or work around the path boundary.
Keeps the doc set inside the out dir and never edits the target source tree.
